subject: fix(ui): rename misleading "Check for Updates" to "Update Now"
body:
The button only appears when updateAvailable is true and calls
applyUpdate() which triggers SKIP_WAITING + reload. "Check for
Updates" implied a search action; "Update Now" accurately describes
the reload behavior.

Tags: ui, ux, clarity
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: patch
